message:
fix(git): anchor exclude patterns to repo root to avoid hiding source code

Git exclude patterns like refinery/ match at any directory depth, which
hides source code directories like internal/refinery/. Anchor with
leading / so they only match at the repo root where GT agent dirs live.

Also accept legacy un-anchored patterns in the doctor check so existing
rigs are not flagged as broken.

Fixes gt-qlwi

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
